mapper.select: SELECT cp.id, cp.user_id, u.email, u.phone, cp.company_name, cp.business_number, cp.industry, cp.company_size, cp.website_url, cp.logo_file_id, cp.description, cp.address, cp.verification_status FROM company_profiles cp JOIN users u ON u.id = cp.user_id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
